---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
```

```{r}


safe_load_all_data <- function(datapath) {
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tools)
  
  data <- fread(datapath) %>%
    mutate(
      # --- collapse states (same logic as before)
      state = ifelse(state_name %in% c("Downsweep", "Opto_Upwsweep","Opto_Upsweep", "Opto_Downsweep", "Upsweep"),
                     "Sound", state_name),
      
      # --- recode trial_type (same as before)
      trial_type = case_when(
        trial_type == 1 ~ "Upsweep",
        trial_type == 2 ~ "Downsweep",
        trial_type == 3 ~ "Opto_Upsweep",
        trial_type == 4 ~ "Opto_Downsweep",
        TRUE ~ as.character(trial_type)
      ),
      
      # --- add file id (same as safe_load_data)
      file_id = file_path_sans_ext(basename(datapath))
    ) %>%
    select(-state_name)
  
  return(data)
}

process_all_data <- function(datapath,
                             Alignment_State,
                             out_dir = NULL) {
  
  library(tidyverse)
  library(data.table)
  library(tools)
  
  # --- determine output directory
  if (is.null(out_dir)) {
    out_dir <- file.path(datapath, "processed_chunks")
  }
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # --- list input files (ONLY data now)
  list_of_data <- list.files(datapath, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  
  # --- Align_to_state (unchanged)
  Align_to_state <- function(Data, Alignment_State) {
    
    filter2 <- Data %>%
      group_by(trial_number) %>%
      filter(state == Alignment_State) %>%
      slice_min(time_bin) %>%
      mutate(minT = time_bin) %>%
      select(minT, trial_number) %>%
      distinct()
    
    Data <- Data %>% left_join(filter2, by = "trial_number")
    
    nearest_fixed <- function(times, fixed_times) {
  fixed_times <- sort(unique(fixed_times[!is.na(fixed_times)]))
  if (length(fixed_times) == 0) return(rep(NA, length(times)))
  
  # Find indices of nearest values
  idx <- findInterval(times, fixed_times, all.inside = TRUE)
  # Compare distance to left and right neighbor to find the absolute nearest
  dist_left <- abs(times - fixed_times[idx])
  dist_right <- abs(times - fixed_times[pmin(idx + 1, length(fixed_times))])
  
  return(ifelse(dist_left < dist_right, fixed_times[idx], fixed_times[pmin(idx + 1, length(fixed_times))]))
}
    
    Data <- Data %>%
      group_by(Animal, condition) %>%
      arrange(Animal, condition, time_bin) %>%
      mutate(
        nearest_fixed = nearest_fixed(time_bin, sort(unique(minT[!is.na(minT)]))),
        rel_time = round(time_bin - nearest_fixed, 2)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      arrange(Animal, condition, time_bin) %>%
      group_by(Animal, condition) %>%
      mutate(aligntrial = cumsum(c(TRUE, diff(rel_time) < -1))) %>%
      unite('aligntrial2', aligntrial, Animal, condition, remove = FALSE) %>%
      select(-aligntrial) %>%
      rename(aligntrial = aligntrial2) %>%
      group_by(aligntrial) %>%
      mutate(trial_type = first(trial_type)) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    datarange <- Data %>%
      group_by(aligntrial) %>%
      reframe(range = range(rel_time)) %>%
      summarise(
        common_min = max(range[c(TRUE, FALSE)]),
        common_max = min(range[c(FALSE, TRUE)])
      )
    
    message("common rel_time: ", datarange$common_min, " to ", datarange$common_max)
    
    Data
  }
  
  # --- process each dataset
  walk2(list_of_data, seq_along(list_of_data), \(data_file, i) {
    
    message("Processing file ", i, "/", length(list_of_data), ": ", basename(data_file))
    
    # --- load (NEW: no meta, no depth)
    d <- safe_load_all_data(data_file)
    
    # --- tidy postprocessing (unchanged)
    d <- d %>%
      mutate(file_id2 = file_id,
             file_id3 = file_id) %>%
      unite('cluster_id', file_id, cluster_id, remove = FALSE) %>%
      unite('trial_number', file_id2, trial_number, remove = FALSE) %>%
      separate_wider_delim(file_id3, names = c('Animal', 'condition'), delim = '_')
    
    # --- align
    d <- Align_to_state(d, Alignment_State = Alignment_State)
    d %>% select(cluster_id:state,aligntrial,Animal,condition,rel_time)
    # --- save
    out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(basename(data_file), "_processed.csv"))
    readr::write_csv(d, out_file)
    
    message("✅ Saved: ", basename(out_file), " (", nrow(d), " rows)")
    
    rm(d); gc()
  })
}
  
```

```{r}
process_all_data("H:/Data/aligned/new/data", "Sound",
                             out_dir = "H:/Data/aligned/new/aligned")
```

```{r}
align_trials_multiple_files <- function(folder_path, baseline_corr = TRUE) {
  
  # Get the list of all files in the folder
  file_list <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE)
  
  # Initialize an empty list to store results
  all_results <- list()

  # Process each file in the folder
  for (file in file_list) {
    # Read the file (assuming CSV format; change as needed)
    data <- read.csv(file)
    
    # Metadata selection
    meta_df <- data %>%
      select(cluster_id, Animal, condition) %>%
      distinct()

    # Compute trialless data
    Trialless <- data %>%
      group_by(trial_type, rel_time, cluster_id) %>%
      summarise(total_event_count = sum(event_count), .groups = "drop") %>%
      left_join(meta_df) %>%
      left_join(
        data %>%
          group_by(Animal, condition, trial_type) %>%
          summarise(n_trials = n_distinct(trial_number), .groups = "drop"),
        by = c("Animal", "condition", "trial_type")
      ) %>%
      mutate(rate = total_event_count / n_trials / 0.01)
    
    # Baseline correction if enabled
    if (baseline_corr) {
      baseline <- Trialless %>%
        filter(between(rel_time, -15, -5)) %>%
        group_by(cluster_id) %>%
        summarise(cl_mean = mean(rate,na.rm=T), cl_sd = sd(rate,na.rm = T))
      
      Trialless <- Trialless %>%
        left_join(baseline) %>%
        group_by(cluster_id) %>%
        mutate(Zscore = (rate - cl_mean) / cl_sd) %>%
        ungroup() 
    }

    # Append the processed file's result to the list
    message("processed" ,file)
    all_results[[file]] <- Trialless
  }

  # Combine all the results into one data frame
  combined_results <- bind_rows(all_results)

  return(combined_results)
}


library(data.table)

align_trials_multiple_files_dt <- function(folder_path, baseline_corr = TRUE) {
  
  file_list <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE)
  
  process_file <- function(file) {
    dt <- fread(file)
    
    # Ensure data.table
    setDT(dt)
    
    # Compute Trialless in one pass
    Trialless <- dt[
      , .(
        total_event_count = sum(event_count),
        n_trials = uniqueN(trial_number)
      ),
      by = .(cluster_id, Animal, condition, trial_type, rel_time)
    ]
    
    # Compute rate
    Trialless[
      , rate := total_event_count / n_trials / 0.01
    ]
    
    # Baseline correction
    if (baseline_corr) {
      
      baseline <- Trialless[
        rel_time >= -15 & rel_time <= -5,
        .(
          cl_mean = mean(rate, na.rm = TRUE),
          cl_sd   = sd(rate, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = cluster_id
      ]
      
      # Join + compute Z in-place (no copies)
      Trialless[baseline, `:=`(
        cl_mean = i.cl_mean,
        cl_sd   = i.cl_sd
      ), on = "cluster_id"]
      
      Trialless[
        , Zscore := (rate - cl_mean) / cl_sd
      ]
    }
    
    Trialless[]
  }
  
  # Process all files (sequential but fast)
   result <- rbindlist(lapply(file_list, process_file), use.names = TRUE)
 
  
  return(result)
}

```

```{r}
Trialless <- align_trials_multiple_files("I:/Data/aligned/new/aligned", baseline_corr = TRUE)
#Trialless2 <- align_trials_multiple_files_dt("I:/Data/aligned/new/aligned", baseline_corr = TRUE)

shock <- read_csv(r"(I:\Data\aligned\extra\Shock_direction.csv)") %>% select(Animal = Animal2, direction)

Trialless <- Trialless %>% left_join(shock)


qm_list = list.files("I:/Data/aligned/new/extra/metrics", full.names = T)
library(readr)
library(purrr)


# get all csv files
files <- qm_list

# function to read and process one file
read_one <- function(file) {
  df <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  df %>%
    # rename first column (often "Unnamed: 0" or similar)
    rename(cluster_id = 1) %>%
    # keep only relevant columns
    select(cluster_id, num_spikes, presence_ratio) %>%
    # add filename as ID
    mutate(ID =tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)))
}

# apply to all files and bind
qm <- map_dfr(files, read_one)

# result
qm <- qm %>% filter(presence_ratio > 0.8) %>% arrange(num_spikes) %>% unite('cluster_id',ID,cluster_id )

Trialless = Trialless %>% filter(cluster_id %in% qm$cluster_id)

Trialless %>% write_csv("I:/Data/aligned/new/wrangled/Trialless_allUnits.csv")

Trialless %>% filter(Animal == '8186')  %>%  filter(between(rel_time, -15, -5)) %>%
        group_by(cluster_id) %>%
        summarise(cl_mean = mean(rate,na.rm=T), cl_sd = sd(rate,na.rm = T))


pclust <- Trialless %>%
  group_by(cluster_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_baseline = sum(between(rel_time, -55, -5))
  ) %>%
  filter(n_baseline == 0) %>% select(cluster_id)

qm %>% filter(cluster_id %in% pclust$cluster_id)

Trialless %>% filter(Animal == "8186" & condition == 'naive') %>% filter(!cluster_id %in% pclust$cluster_id) %>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,total_event_count))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(~cluster_id)

```

```{r}

Trialless %>% filter(between(rel_time,-1,7)) %>% mutate(Opto = ifelse(trial_type %in% c('Downsweep','Upsweeep'),'no','opto')) %>%   unite('ID',Animal,condition)  %>% group_by(ID,rel_time,Opto) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate,na.rm=T)) %>%  ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,col=Opto))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1)+
  facet_wrap(~ID,scales ='free_y')




```

```{r}

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,0,0.03)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore ))  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")



```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Get files, read them, and use filenames as IDs in one pipe
depths <- list.files("H:/Data/aligned/new/extra/extrenum_channels", "*.csv", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  set_names(basename(.) %>% str_remove(".csv")) %>%
  map_dfr(read_csv, .id = "source_file")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.12,0)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 1000)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.5)+
  facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.12,0.1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 200)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.5)

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.12,0.1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 400)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.5)

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.12,0.1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.5)

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.12,0.1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um > 1000)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.5)




                        
                        
                        
```

```{r}
zeta_opto <- list.files("H:/Data/aligned/new/extra/zeta/opto", "*.csv", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  set_names(basename(.) %>% str_remove(".csv")) %>%
  map_dfr(read_csv, .id = "source_file")

Trialless %>% left_join( zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit))


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um > 1000) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line()+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um > 1000) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line()

```

```{r}

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
ggtitle("raw")


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,5)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore ))  %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("depth")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,5)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta+depth")



```

```{r}
Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
ggtitle("raw")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore ))  %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("depth")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,1)) %>%  mutate(Zscore = replace_na(Zscore,0.01 ), Zscore= ifelse(Zscore > 10000, 0.01,Zscore )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(Zscore = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,Zscore,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta+depth")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")

```

# fr , avg

```{r}

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
ggtitle("raw")




Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,5)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate ))  %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("depth")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
geom_line(alpha=.5)+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta+depth")

```

#fr sessions

```{r}
Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
ggtitle("raw")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")




Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)  %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate ))  %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("depth")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,Animal,condition) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
  ggtitle("optozeta+depth")+
   facet_wrap(condition~Animal, scales = "free")
```

# Opto diff

```{r}
Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,5)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)   %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = trial_type,values_from = rate) %>% mutate(downsweep_diff = Opto_Downsweep-Downsweep, upsweep_diff = Opto_Upwsweep -Upsweep) %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(downsweep_diff,upsweep_diff),names_to = "trial_type",values_to = "fr")%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,fr,col=trial_type))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.1)

Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,5)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = trial_type,values_from = rate) %>% mutate(downsweep_diff = Opto_Downsweep-Downsweep, upsweep_diff = Opto_Upwsweep -Upsweep) %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(downsweep_diff,upsweep_diff),names_to = "trial_type",values_to = "fr")%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,fr,col=trial_type))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.1)


Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-0.2,5)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = trial_type,values_from = rate) %>% mutate(downsweep_diff = Opto_Downsweep-Downsweep, upsweep_diff = Opto_Upwsweep -Upsweep) %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(downsweep_diff,upsweep_diff),names_to = "trial_type",values_to = "fr")%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,fr,col=trial_type))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(se=F,span=0.1)
```

# Opto modulation direction

```{r}

dirs <- Trialless %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-10,5)) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% left_join(zeta_opto %>% unite('cluster_id',source_file,unit)) %>%  filter(p_val < 0.05)  %>% mutate(chunks = case_when(rel_time < -0.1 ~ "baseline", .default = "audio")) %>% group_by(cluster_id,chunks) %>% summarise(mfr = mean(rate)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = chunks, values_from = mfr) %>% mutate(diff= audio-baseline) %>% mutate(dir = ifelse(diff > 0, "eh","reduced")) %>%  select(cluster_id,dir)


Trialless %>% left_join(dirs) %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>%   mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition)) %>%  group_by(rel_time,trial_type,dir) %>% summarise(rate = mean(rate))%>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,rate,colour = trial_type))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.1,se=F)+
ggtitle("raw")+
  facet_wrap(~dir, scales="free")

Trialless %>% left_join(dirs) %>%  filter(between(rel_time,-1,1)) %>%left_join(depths %>% group_by(source_file) %>% mutate(maxdepth = max(dist_from_tip_um)) %>% unite("cluster_id",source_file,unit_id)) %>%  filter(maxdepth-dist_from_tip_um < 800) %>%  mutate(rate = replace_na(rate,0.01 ), rate= ifelse(rate > 10000, 0.01,rate )) %>% mutate(condition = ifelse(condition =="naivel","naive", condition))  %>% distinct(cluster_id,dir) %>% count(dir)
```
